objective: Search papers, GitHub, and public dataset APIs for non-repeated MainRegimeV2 parent-root label panels or direct Manipulation row sources after the v8 completion audit.

audited_sources.reason: README describes yfinance historical stock data, technical indicators, and KMeans or optional HMM classification for Bull/Bear/Sideways. It provides code-level model output, not an independent historical source-label panel, no Crisis root, and no direct Manipulation rows.

Order-book analysis/collector code can inform future direct-input acquisition, but the repository does not provide materialized timestamped spoofing/layering/quote-stuffing positive rows with matched negatives.

audited_sources.source_id: paper:Order spoofing, price impact, and market quality
audited_sources.reason: Useful direct Manipulation ontology for aggressive order revisions, opposite-side executions, price reversal, opening/closing session effects, and illiquid contracts. The paper relies on complete millisecond Taiwan derivatives order/trade data, but no public replayable row export was found in this pass.

Useful direct Manipulation ontology for cross-market spoofing across related FX limit order books. The public surface describes high-frequency EBS limit order book snapshots, but no public timestamped positive/negative source-label export was found.

Current public hits such as akashkumar5 HMM6 BTCUSD, AAdevloper NIFTY50, ClarusC64 mapping sets, and sujinwo TSIE are already ledgered or remain HMM/technical/rule/tiny mapping/proxy-only sources. No new exact MainRegimeV2 label panel surfaced.

blocker: No new source in this pass provides exact provider/instrument/timeframe Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis label windows or materialized direct Manipulation positives with matched negatives beyond already accepted scoped social/event, self-trade, and wash-maker slices.
next_action: Parent-root acquisition remains blocking: obtain exact provider/instrument/timeframe MainRegimeV2 label panels or an explicit owner-approved crosswalk; for Manipulation, acquire replayable direct spoofing/layering/quote-stuffing/order-lifecycle positives plus matched negatives.
